mapper.select: SELECT RGN_CD FROM REGION WHERE RGN_NAME = #{rgnName} AND RGN_USE_YN = 'Y' LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT p.PLC_NO AS id, p.PLC_NAME AS name, p.PLC_RGN_CD AS regionCode, r.RGN_NAME AS regionName, p.PLC_CAT_CD AS placeCategory, cat.CMM_CD_NAME AS placeCategoryName, p.PLC_LOT AS x, p.PLC_LAT AS y, p.PLC_OVERVIEW AS overview, p.PLC_FLT_CD AS placeFilter, flt.CMM_CD_NAME AS placeFilterName FROM PLACE p JOIN REGION r ON p.PLC_RGN_CD = r.RGN_CD JOIN CMM_CODE cat ON p.PLC_CAT_CD = cat.CMM_CD JOIN CMM_CODE flt ON p.PLC_FLT_CD = flt.CMM_CD LEFT JOIN PLACE_TAG_MAP ptm ON p.PLC_NO = ptm.PTAG_PLC_NO WHERE p.PLC_RGN_CD = #{rgnCd} AND p.PLC_USE_YN = 'Y' AND (
ptm.PTAG_TAG_CD IN
#{code}
OR p.PLC_CAT_CD = 'PLC003'
OR p.PLC_CAT_CD = 'PLC004'
OR p.PLC_FLT_CD = 'FLT010' ) ORDER BY p.PLC_NO DESC
